title: Apartment price appreciates 8-20% annually in Jan-Mar across top 8 cities: JLL
description: On apartment sales, the data showed that sales of flats, costing below ₹50 lakh each, fell 24% in January-March to 20,269 units. Apartments priced above ₹1 crore were in demand, with sales increasing 30% to 50,362 units
